  - decathlon (rows 37 & 38)
  - 10000 m walk (track) (rows 41 & 42)
  
- Events appearing only once (not duplicated):

- The count of duplicated entries (appear more than once) is 6 (half marathon, 25 km (road), 30 km (road), marathon, decathlon, 10000 m walk (track)).
- The count of unique entries (appearing only once) is all other rows: 49 total rows - 12 rows from duplicates (6 duplicates * 2 rows each) = 37 unique entries.

Therefore:
- "Appears" count (duplicate entries): 6
- "Does not appear" count (unique entries): 37
